author: maintainer-agent

patch.value:
Add an integration test in cli.integration.spec.ts that:
1. Creates items with draft/open/in_progress/blocked/closed/canceled statuses
2. Runs pm list (bare command)
3. Verifies closed and canceled items are NOT present
4. Verifies draft/open/in_progress/blocked items ARE present
Add integration test for pm list active-only behavior

The pm list command (without qualifiers) now excludes terminal statuses (closed/canceled) by default, but there is no integration test for this CLI behavior. Unit test covers excludeTerminal option in runList(), but integration test only covers list-draft/list-open/list-in-progress/list-blocked/list-closed/list-canceled/list-all, not the bare 'pm list' command.
pm list integration test verifies active-only behavior: terminal statuses excluded, non-terminal included. Tests pass at 100% coverage.
pm list behavior is already implemented; just need to add integration test coverage
Maintain 100% integration test coverage for all CLI behaviors
Cover pm list terminal-exclusion behavior in integration tests
Prevents regression of pm list active-only behavior
Ensures pm list excludeTerminal wiring is always tested at CLI level
Integration test suite covers pm list bare command
pm list behavior was changed in session 6 but no integration test was added for the CLI wiring

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Gap found: integration test suite tests list-draft/list-open/list-in-progress/list-blocked/list-closed/list-canceled/list-all but not bare pm list. The excludeTerminal unit test in list-command.spec.ts covers the function but not CLI wiring.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Add to the existing filters list/list-* integration test or create new test. Should use existing createItem helper pattern. Assert count=4 for non-terminal items only.

message: Create: track integration test gap for pm list active-only behavior | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings,assignee,parent,reviewer,sprint,release,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,reporter,severity,environment,repro_steps,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,affected_version,fixed_version,component,regression,customer_impact

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation: added pm list active-only assertions to 'filters list/list-* status commands across lifecycle states' integration test. The test creates 7 items (draft/open/open/in_progress/blocked/closed/canceled), runs pm list, and asserts count=5 (non-terminal), no closed/canceled, all of draft/open/in_progress/blocked present. Full suite: 536/536 tests pass, 100% coverage maintained.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Integration test for pm list active-only behavior added and verified. 536/536 tests pass, 100% coverage maintained.

message: Close: pm list integration test added - verifies terminal status exclusion at CLI level
